seo.title: Conversations with men | M-Path blog
seo.description: Ways to engage men and boys in conversations about masculinity, mental health and allyship — by inviting men in, rather than making them feel excluded.

hero.title: Conversations with men
hero.lead: Engaging men and boys in conversations about masculinity, mental health and allyship can be difficult. This blog outlines some of the ways to have those conversations — by inviting men to the discussion, rather than making them feel excluded.
